data.body:
Release v0.10.0 completed and verified across all channels. Evidence:

Gerrit change (LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1, merged): https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/912 — merged commit 7f709dad5 on main (rebar-ticket: cephalic-tangy-lizard).

Release workflow run (all jobs success): https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/29973775720 — Authorize (dispatch-from-main + version-lockstep + ancestry + pypi env preflight), Build-once, Test-wheel, Test-sdist, Consolidate-evidence, Publish-to-PyPI, Create-GitHub-Release, Publish-to-MCP-Registry all green. pypi deployment approved via required-reviewers gate.

1) PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/nava-rebar/0.10.0/ — latest=0.10.0, files nava_rebar-0.10.0-py3-none-any.whl + nava_rebar-0.10.0.tar.gz. Post-publish smoke probe against pipx-installed nava-rebar[mcp]==0.10.0: PROBE RESULT 140 passed, 0 failed.

2) GitHub Release: tag v0.10.0, marked Latest, draft=false prerelease=false, assets = wheel + sdist + SHA256SUMS (https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/releases/tag/v0.10.0).

3) MCP Registry: io.github.navapbc/rebar version 0.10.0 listed at https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io/v0/servers?search=io.github.navapbc/rebar.

4) Homebrew: autobump run https://github.com/navapbc/homebrew-rebar/actions/runs/29974073141 completed success; Formula/rebar.rb url now nava_rebar-0.10.0.tar.gz, sha256 757c45524c759a599ccdce43d533e41f90e527713214ab47414cd4b1ebe87892.

Version-lockstep (release authorize check) passed locally rc=0 and in CI: pyproject.toml + server.json (top-level + packages[].version) all 0.10.0; CHANGELOG.md has curated [0.10.0] section.
